provider: CUHK Department of Electronic Engineering 2025-26 Major Programme Requirement
note: The official scheme applies to students admitted in 2025-26 and publishes a 75-unit Major Programme Requirement. Slash-separated ENGG/ESTR and ELEG/ESTR entries are alternatives, PHYS1110 and PHYS1003 are alternatives, and SEEM2440, ESTR2500 and DOTE1030 form a choose-one group; alternative entries are retained as distinct official course codes and must not be added together as required credits. ENGG1040 is excluded because it is a conditional mathematics bridge for some admittees before ENGG1125 and does not count toward the 75-unit Major Programme Requirement. The open, approval-based substitution by 5000-level Engineering postgraduate courses is not enumerable and is excluded. ELITE Stream, senior-year AD/HD entry, ELEG-IBBA double degree and minor curricula are outside this standard four-year path. Individual Elective courses are not assigned a Year or Term because the official recommended pattern specifies only aggregate Elective slots.
